title: YöL 4x gin cocktail glasses balloon clear plastic cup home picnics BBQ summer party tableware drinks cup glasses drinkware outdoor durable gin glasses
features: DRINK IN STYLE: Add an elegant touch to your summer party, barbecue, picnic, holiday celebrations or any outdoor dining with these Clear Balloon Gin Glasses from Bello Designs!

HIGH QUALITY SET: These gin glasses are made from high quality polystyrene (PS) plastic, which is very strong, durable and made to last. This set is impact resistant and can withstand regular use and the strain of being packed in a bag with other heavy items. Due to the material this set is made off, it can easily be wiped clean and stacked together for easy storage too.

ECO-FRIENDLY: Help the environment by stopping buying disposable glasses for your BBQs, camping or picnics. This set will save you money because you can reuse them again and again, rather than throwing away paper cups and having to buy more.

MULTI-USE DINING: These gin glasses are perfect to use indoor or outdoor. They are great for picnics, BBQ's, summer parties, birthdays, holidays or for general use if you just feel like having a refreshing cocktail after work.
FEATURES: Capacity: 600ml. Material: Polystyrene (PS) Plastic. Glass height approximately: 20.5cm. Top diameter approximately: 8.7cm. Pack of 4 Gin Glasses.
